summary: Start M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 after M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 closed on origin/main. The task must create or consolidate client design tokens and asset replacement slots using the accepted M7 UI/localization plan and visual UX handoff, while preserving simulation authority and avoiding final art or culture-specific assets.

tests_run.result: Started from clean main at e9f1a4b43d34460b23908f31a8146723004cf5cf, then created feat/m7-design-tokens-asset-slots.

M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 are ready candidates; design tokens selected first because M7 i18n is now closed and downstream UI tasks depend on the token/asset-slot foundation.

decisions.decision: Start M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 before downstream app shell/map/inspector/appointment UI polish because it provides the shared visual token and asset-slot foundation.

This task may create neutral placeholders and replacement slots, but not final production art, culture-specific imagery, religious symbols, portraits, scripts, flags, clothing, architecture, music, or ritual motifs.

risks.summary: A visual-token task can drift into full UI redesign or final art production.
risks.mitigation: Keep implementation limited to centralized tokens, slot registry, placeholder/final distinction, Storybook states, and tests in allowed paths.

requested_action: Implement the M7 design tokens and asset replacement slots within allowed paths, run required tests, and return a writer REVIEW handoff.
